---
title: "target.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tmp_diag/target.py"
loc: 1
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.60
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 6.87
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating new. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `new`
